name: Premier Cru
address: 15 High Street, Sai Ying Pun, Hong Kong
welcomeMessage: Welcome to Premier Cru — your French wine library in Sai Ying Pun. We've added our current French regional selections to your Journey. Burgundy, Champagne, and the Rhône Valley are the heart of our collection.
